seo_content:
Crypto Fund Trader Technical Infrastructure

Crypto Fund Trader, based in Switzerland and established in November 2022, is a crypto-focused proprietary trading firm offering four program types: 1-Phase (1-step), 2-Phases (2-step), Instant Funding, and the Ascend program. Account sizes range from $5,000 to $200,000 across the 1-Phase and 2-Phase programs. The firm supports over 500 tradable instruments across digital assets and traditional markets and positions itself as a primary destination for traders interested in cryptocurrency-led strategies alongside broader multi-asset access.

The 1-Phase program covers six account sizes: $5,000 at $58.59 (original $63.00), $10,000 at $111.60 (original $120.00), $25,000 at $243.66 (original $262.00), $50,000 at $418.50 (original $450.00), $100,000 at $733.77 (original $789.00), and $200,000 at $1,376.40 (original $1,480.00). The 2-Phases program is available in four sizes: $25,000 at $223.20 (original $240.00), $50,000 at $361.77 (original $389.00), $100,000 at $613.80 (original $660.00), and $200,000 at $1,162.50 (original $1,250.00). Payments are accepted via Credit/Debit Card and Crypto.

Four platforms are supported: Bybit, CFT Platform, Match Trader, and MT5. Tradable instruments include FX, Indices, Crypto, Stocks, and Other Commodities. Leverage is uniform across all program types: FX at 1:30, Indices at 1:20, Crypto at 1:5, and Stocks at 1:5. News trading is permitted without restriction on 1-Phase, 2-Phases, and Instant accounts. On Ascend accounts, news trading is restricted within 2 minutes before and after high-impact events. Copy trading between Ascend accounts is explicitly prohibited.

Payout processing for 1-Phase and 2-Phase accounts occurs after either 15 trading days or 30 calendar days have elapsed. Instant accounts can request payouts on demand after achieving 10% profit, or follow the same 15/30-day schedule. The Ascend program pays out on demand immediately after passing the evaluation, after which the account is closed. Minimum payout amounts are not specified. Payout methods are Bank Transfer and Crypto.

Crypto Fund Trader enforces a maximum total allocation of $300,000 across all 1-Step and 2-Step combined accounts, and limits traders to a maximum of 3 Instant accounts up to $30,000 total. The reverse trading rule prohibits closing all open trades in one direction and immediately opening in the opposite direction when simultaneous trades have been running for 60 seconds or more. A gambling rule caps daily and per-trade profits at $10,000. EAs are permitted with no explicit ban beyond these rules.
